title: How childcare could be optimised across local areas
body: "This work examines access to childcare in England and looks at how to optimise childcare provision. This release includes:    main findings   methodology   data tables     This is the third publication in our series exploring childcare accessibility. You can also read our previous work in this series:    Childcare accessibility by neighbourhood – our methodology examining childcare accessibility by neighbourhood in England, published with the Office for National Statistics  Changes in access to childcare in England – our analysis of childcare accessibility in England over the past 4 years   "
